differential_diagnoses: Septic embolization (e.g., to pulmonary or systemic circulation)
next_steps: Urgent transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) to evaluate for valvular vegetations and aortic pathology
Repeat blood cultures (serial) to monitor for persistent bacteremia
Urgent cardiothoracic surgical consultation to evaluate the aortic mural thickening/outpouching
Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the thoracic spine to rule out spondylodiscitis or epidural abscess
Computed tomography angiography (CTA) of the chest with specific attention to the thoracic aorta to rule out evolving mycotic aneurysm or dissection
Consult infectious disease for optimization of antibiotic therapy (switch to directed therapy based on MICs)
